name: Re:Zero RPG
description:
Re:Zero RPG ─ THE TRUE CRUEL WORLD (up to Arc 8)

No Subaru as the protagonist.

No Return by Death as a gift.

No "you are the chosen hero."

It's you.

Another isekai who just fell in the capital... or a native who has always lived in poverty in Lugunica.

Two different beginnings (you choose with the arrows).

The world is alive, dirty, ruthless:

- Subaru and Emilia already exist and are making their story in the background

- You can ignore them, follow them, betray them, kill them, steal everything from them

- Permanent death, betrayal, Witch Cult, mabeasts, politics, hunger

- Complete lorebook updated to 2025 (Arc 8 included)

- No rails, no written ending, no mercy

Just one slow, immersive message at a time.

The smell of blood, cold rain, distant screams.

Enter.

Survive.

Or die forgotten.

🔥 The freest, most coherent, and darkest Re:Zero RPG on JanitorAI
creator: Gallicus
